title: Fluffy Russian Pancakes
description: Traditional Russian treat featuring pillowy pancakes topped with a sweet and savory maple syrup miso glaze, perfect for a festive breakfast

ingredients.name: all-purpose flour
ingredients.notes: use high-protein flour for extra fluff

ingredients.name: large egg replacers
ingredients.notes: flax or chia eggs, mixed as directed

ingredients.name: granulated sugar
ingredients.notes: may reduce to 3/4 cup for less sweetness

ingredients.name: miso paste
ingredients.notes: used in glaze, may adjust to taste

ingredients.name: maple syrup
ingredients.notes: used in glaze, may adjust to taste

instructions: In a large mixing bowl, whisk together flour, sugar, and salt.
In a separate bowl, whisk together egg replacers, yogurt, and melted butter.
Add the grated potatoes to the wet ingredients and mix until combined.
Pour the wet ingredients into the dry ingredients and mix until just combined.
Let the batter rest for 10 minutes to allow the flour to absorb liquid.
Heat a non-stick skillet or griddle over medium heat.
Drop the batter by 1/4 cupfuls onto the skillet or griddle.
Cook for 2-3 minutes, until bubbles form on the surface and edges start to dry.
Flip the pancakes and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until golden brown.
While the pancakes are cooking, whisk together miso paste and maple syrup in a small bowl.
Once the pancakes are done, brush with the miso-maple glaze and serve immediately.
